name: codoop-flow
description: codoop-flow: in-session orchestration for an AI-coding ticket pipeline (build/verify/review/ship) with a deterministic guardrail CLI.

plugins.name: codoop-discover
plugins.description: Venture-Discovery Loop: collaborative product discovery with multi-role expert agents (PM, GTM, UX/UI, Architect). Generates comprehensive backlog documentation.

plugins.name: codoop-flow
plugins.description: Drive codoop-flow tickets in-session: pick -> build -> verify -> review -> ship, plus human-facing discover and ticket-lifecycle CLIs.
